verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am standing here Lord in prayer on Your Word And I know, when You see faith, You will hear Your children’s prayer

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Fill Your vessels with Your power, God And let devils flee from whence they came For You are God delivering Your people Giving us the victory As we stand Lord, prayerfully

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We believe Lord, by faith, in a finished work That You’ve made through Your blood, Lord and Your death on Calvary

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Fill Your church God, with Your power And let devils flee when we pray For You are God healing Your people Giving us the victory As we make ready for eternity :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are God delivering Your people You are God healing Your people You are God with Your people
